monster.name: SirAldric

trait.name: Partial Incorporeality
trait.text: Sir Aldric can move through creatures and objects as difficult terrain. He takes 5 (1d10) force damage if he ends his turn inside an object.

trait.name: Command Aura (9m / 30ft)
trait.text: allied undead within the aura have advantage on attack rolls.

trait.name: Guardian's Will
trait.text: if reduced to 0 HP, he can make a Constitution save DC 10 (+1 for each time after the first). On a success, he returns to 1 HP.

action.name: Multiattack
action.text: Sir Aldric makes two attacks with the Spectral Greatsword.

monster.description: Sir Aldric is a warrior transformed into a vengeful spirit. He appears as an ethereal figure with a pale face and melancholic eyes, wrapped in spectral armor that emanates a cold, bluish light. His sword is incorporeal but cuts like steel. He embodies the boundary between sacredness and unease — a guardian who didn't choose his fate but accepts it with solemnity. Distinctive trait: he speaks with a cavernous, measured voice, like a judge who has already passed sentence. He is not hostile by nature — he is hostile by duty.
